import sys

n, k = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())

def solve(n, k):
    # initialize the array to have the labels 1 to n in order
    p = list(range(1, n + 1))
    # initialize the messiness to 0
    messiness = 0
    # loop through the minutes
    for i in range(k):
        # find the maximum messiness achievable by swapping the first and last stalls
        # if the messiness is greater than the current messiness, update the messiness
        messiness = max(messiness, max(p[1] - p[0], p[n - 1] - p[n - 2]))
        # swap the first and last stalls
        p[0], p[n - 1] = p[n - 1], p[0]
    return messiness

print(solve(n, k))
